item.description:
Around The NFL reposteó NFL Draft @NFLDraft · 27min In his first and only seven-round mock of the 2026 NFL Draft, @chad_reuter forecasts some Day 1 surprises and four first-round trades. See all of his projections, 1-257.

item.title: ESPNNFL: Adam Schefter reposteó NFL on ESPN @ESPNNFL · 1h "He never quit on himself or lost any confidence … I think his mom play
item.description:
Adam Schefter reposteó NFL on ESPN @ESPNNFL · 1h "He never quit on himself or lost any confidence … I think his mom played a big part in that."
Wide receiver Carnell Tate is confident, intelligent and ready to star in the NFL. His late mother made sure of it
(via @MerrillLiz ) De espn.com 19 44 285 215 mil
